creator: logan@elandsys.com
text:
Created attachment 150505
Capsicum for tcpdump

The latest release of tcpdump has incorporated the latest changes for capsicum. It has a small issue where we need to change the configure.in script so as not to test for cap_rights_init() which is a macro.

This will hopefully be fixed in the next release of tcpdump.

Meanwhile, this patchset fixes it.
